lines.english: When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, egotism is eradicated.
Then, the mortal is honored in the Court of the True Lord.
He sees the Dear Lord always close at hand, ever-present.
By Guru's Grace, contemplate Him forever.
The Lord cherishes all beings and creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dar saachai pat siau ghar jaae |
lines.english: You shall go to your true home in the Lord's Court with honor.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he sees the Lord pervading and permeating all. ||3||
One who worships the Lord within his mind,
Basant, Third Mehl:
O Nanak, through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, you shall be blessed with glorious greatness. ||4||3||
People in duality suffer terrible pain.
The True Guru has shown me the One Lord. ||1||
sees the One and Only Lord, and no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਗਾਇ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man mauliaa gaae gun gobind |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This mind blossoms forth, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe. ||1||Pause||
My God is in bloom, forever in spring.
So consult the Guru, and reflect upon His wisdom;
then, you shall be in love with the True Lord God.
Then, the Life of the World shall come to dwell in your mind. ||2||
Abandon your self-conceit, and be His loving servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਕਾ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਭੇਉ ॥
lines.translit: eis bhagatee kaa koee jaanai bheo |
lines.english: Only a rare few know the mystery of this devotional worship.
My God is forever permeating and pervading all.
Worship Him with devotion, and see Him always ever-present, close at hand.
My God is the Enlightener of all souls. ||3||
The True Guru Himself unites us in His Union.
He Himself links our consciousness to the Lord, the Life of the World.
Basant, Third Mehl:
Thus, our minds and bodies are rejuvenated with intuitive ease.
O Nanak, through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, we remain attuned to the String of His Love. ||4||4||
by Guru's Grace, with intuitive ease.
Through devotional worship, self-conceit is eradicated from within,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal har vasai man aae |
lines.english: The Lord is the Lover of His devotees; He dwells within their minds,
and then, one meets the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai het saachai prem piaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Loving the Guru, they have love and affection for the True Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੁਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat soheh sadaa har prabh duaar |
lines.english: His devotees are forever beauteous at the Door of the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo aap vasai man aae |
lines.english: The Dear Lord Himself comes to dwell within the mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat kare so jan niramal hoe |
lines.english: That humble being who worships the Lord with devotion becomes immaculate and pure.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, egotism is eradicated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਰਵਿ ਗੁਣ ਗੁਵਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: man tan hariaa rav gun guvind |
lines.english: Their minds and bodies are rejuvenated, uttering the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.
and the mortal remains immersed in peace, tranquility and intuitive ease. ||2||
Those who are imbued with Truth, are forever in the bloom of spring.
Without the Lord's Name, the world is dry and parched.
It burns in the fire of desire, over and over again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਕਰੇ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: soee kare ji har jeeo bhaavai |
lines.english: One who does only that which is pleasing to the Dear Lord
O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, comes to abide in his mind. ||4||5||
He serves His God with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਰੀਰਿ ਭਾਣੈ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa sukh sareer bhaanai chit laavai |
lines.english: - his body is forever at peace, and his consciousness is attached to the Lord's Will.
Attachment to Maya is burnt away by the Word of the Shabad.
The tree bears fruit at the Lord's Door,
The mind and body are rejuvenated by the Love of the True Guru.
Basant, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਫਲੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach fal laagai satigur bhaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: loving the True Guru, it bears the fruit of truth. ||1||Pause||
in love with the True Bani of the Guru's Word, and the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||
This mind is rejuvenated, with intuitive ease;
The plants have blossomed forth, giving a dense shade.
He Himself is near, and He Himself is far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਦ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad vekhai sad hajoor |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is seen to be ever-present, close at hand.
Night and day, he sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, day and night.
The True Guru drives out sin and doubt from within.
The Gurmukh blossoms forth, with intuitive ease. ||2||
